inventory.name: Grabber
inventory.description: A grabber that can be used to pick up sand.

inventory.name: Demolisher
inventory.description: A demolisher that can be used to remove structures. Shortcut: [X]

inventory.name: Marquee
inventory.description: A marquee tool that can be used to move or copy structures (hold [C] to copy and [Backspace] to delete). Shortcut: [Shift]
